kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: Cooper goes with exactly four of Beatrix, Pottery, Eastcheap, Earl, and 6 coins.
The artisan in Riverside's levy is at least 4 coins more than the artisan who makes Horseshoes.
Horseshoes, Baron, and Earl go with Potter, Millpond, and Riverside, in some order.
Either Potter goes with Baron or Edmund goes with Earl.
Rowan goes with at least three of Fletcher, Horseshoes, Riverside, and 8 coins.
Earl goes with either Wulfric or Pottery (but not both).
The artisan in Highrow's levy is exactly 4 coins more than the artisan serving the Knight.
Boots does not go with 12 coins.

fishing.name: The Fishing Derby
fishing.description: Anglers at the lake-country derby each landed a different fish from a different pond on a different lure. Work out who caught what, and where.
clues: Bass goes with exactly four of Boone, Spoon, Birchpool, Dough, and 2 lb.
The angler at Willowmere's weight is at least 4 lb more than the angler using the Spinnerbait.
Spinnerbait, Corn, and Dough go with Pike, Stillwater, and Willowmere, in some order.
Either Pike goes with Corn or Esther goes with Dough.
Mabel goes with at least three of Catfish, Spinnerbait, Willowmere, and 4 lb.
Dough goes with either Wade or Spoon (but not both).
The angler at Foxglen's weight is exactly 4 lb more than the angler fishing with Maggot.
Popper does not go with 8 lb.
